scope_statement: International insurance supervisory standards — IAIS Insurance Core Principles, Application Papers, ComFrame, the Holistic Framework — plus selected publicly-available NAIC Model Laws and Lloyd's Market Requirements.
scope_exclusions: NAIC Model Laws gated behind member registration (HTTP 403 without credentials)
Lloyd's Market Bulletins (JS-rendered listing with no public JSON feed)
Non-English publications (translations skipped to avoid duplicate ICP entries)
National implementation of international standards (covered by per-jurisdiction MCPs)
Draft / consultation papers (only finalised standards indexed)

sources.name: IAIS — Insurance Core Principles, ComFrame, Application Papers
sources.notes: Scraped iais.org sitemap (78) + live pages (6); normalised into 26 ICPs + 14 application papers + 17 supervisory items.

sources.name: NAIC — Model Laws
sources.notes: HTTP 403 — content gated behind NAIC member registration. Premium customer-supplied credentials may enable ingestion in a future iteration.

sources.name: Lloyd's — Market Bulletins and Minimum Standards
sources.notes: Bulletin listing is JS-rendered; curated known-bulletin URLs returned HTTP 404. Reliable capture requires a headless-browser pass or the official subscription feed.

gaps.description: NAIC Model Laws require authenticated access
gaps.reason: HTTP 403 from unauthenticated clients; most PDFs behind member registration

gaps.description: Lloyd's bulletin listing requires JavaScript rendering
gaps.reason: No public JSON feed; server-rendered HTML lacks bulletin links
